panels.prompt: young woman, dark hair, contemplative expression, simple dark clothing, manga, black and white, high contrast, heavy ink, dark shadows, psychological, sparse background, screen tones, halftone, mixed: close-up, medium, wide, confined interior space, dim lighting, shadows on walls, visible tension, guarded body language, uncertain expression, masterpiece, best quality ITE: implicit pacing — vary panel scale and gutters; prefer organic backgrounds; natural branching detail; avoid grid, glitch, or tiled mechanical patterns. fractal-friendly categories: arboreal, aquatic, atmospheric, geological.
panels.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, bad anatomy, watermark, text, logo, colorful, cute, chibi, pastel, bright, happy, geometric grid, digital noise, repeating tile

composition_notes.summary: multi-panel sequence, escalation to turning point
